description: Model must issue a single get_weather tool call with the correct location argument extracted from a natural-language prompt. Validates that the model chooses the right tool and populates required parameters.
prompt: What is the current weather in Edinburgh? Use the available tool to fetch it.

toolDefinitions.name: get_weather
toolDefinitions.description: Retrieves the current weather conditions for a given location.

location.description: City name or city + country, e.g. 'Edinburgh, UK'.

unit.description: Temperature unit. Defaults to celsius if omitted.
